title: oenothera villosa subsp. strigosa
intro: Oenothera villosa subsp. strigosa, also known as the silky evening primrose or threadleaf evening primrose, is a perennial plant native to North America. It is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain high levels of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera villosa subsp. strigosa include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a supplement in capsule or oil form, or used in herbal teas and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
